---
title: "Changelog"
---

## Releases

VedicDateTime releases are tracked on CRAN and GitHub.

- CRAN: [cran.r-project.org/package=VedicDateTime](https://cran.r-project.org/package=VedicDateTime)
- GitHub releases: [github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/releases](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/releases)
